message:
feat: add detection support for aider, amp, chatgpt, clawdbot, openclaw, pi_agent, and vibe connectors

Expand the agent detection library to cover the remaining CASS connector
set that was previously only detectable via CASS's own detection logic:

Connector registry:
- Add aider, amp, chatgpt, clawdbot, openclaw, pi_agent, and vibe to
  KNOWN_CONNECTORS static list

Alias resolution:
- Add canonical_connector_slug() mappings: aider-cli -> aider,
  amp-cli -> amp, chatgpt-desktop/chat-gpt -> chatgpt,
  clawd-bot -> clawdbot, open-claw -> openclaw,
  pi-agent/piagent -> pi_agent, vibe-cli -> vibe

Probe roots:
- Add default_probe_roots() entries for each new connector covering
  macOS (Library/Application Support), Linux (~/.config, ~/.local/share),
  and Windows (AppData/Roaming) paths where applicable
- aider: .aider.chat.history.md and .aider directory
- amp: standalone data dirs plus VS Code globalStorage for Sourcegraph ext
- chatgpt: macOS Application Support for desktop app
- clawdbot: .clawdbot/sessions
- openclaw: .openclaw/agents
- pi_agent: .pi/agent/sessions
- vibe: .vibe/logs/session

Tests:
- Add cass_connectors_and_aliases_detect_via_overrides() test exercising
  all seven new connectors with root overrides and alias resolution,
  verifying correct slug normalization and detection count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
